title: salvia formosana var. matsudae
intro: Salvia formosana var. matsudae is a plant species in the genus Salvia, commonly known as sage, and is native to Taiwan. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salvia formosana var. matsudae include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
